particulars.description: The freehold property known as 146 blackstock road, london, N4 2DY as the same is registered at hm land registry with title number LN71584 and any part or parts of it and including all rights attached or appurtenant to it and all buildings fixtures fittings plant and machinery from time to time situated on it.
F/H 146 blackstock road london 91 hazellville road london and 35 37 and 37A carters green west bromwich west midlands t/nos LN71584 255488 and WM252139.

F/H 91 hazellville road london with the benefit of all rights, licences, guarantees, rent deposits, contracts, deeds undertakings & warranties relating to the property. Any shares or membership rights in any management company for the property. Any goodwill of any business from time to time carried on at the property. Any rental & other money payable and any legal licence or other interest created in respect of the property & all other payments whatever in respect of the property.
